headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 16, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a crucial 8-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Adrian Del Castillo leading the offense. Kevin Ginkel pitched 2 strong innings, striking out 4 batters and allowing 1 earned run. The St. Louis Cardinals also secured a win, defeating the Cleveland Guardians 5-3 behind Alec Burleson's 2 hits and 2 RBIs. The Boston Red Sox dominated the Minnesota Twins 9-5, with Trevor Story contributing 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Washington Nationals left-hander Ken Waldichuk, who has been transferred to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness. The Texas Rangers have also placed several players on the injured list, including Chris Martin (right shoulder impingement), Luis Curvelo (right biceps strain), and Cody Bradford (left elbow surgery rehab). The New York Mets have placed Jared Young on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 13, 2026, with a left meniscus tear.

The MLB trade market has been active, with several notable deals taking place. The Baltimore Orioles acquired RHP Axel Perez from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for RHP Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Take Down Orioles 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured an 8-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Adrian Del Castillo leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. Kevin Ginkel pitched 2 strong innings, striking out 4 batters and allowing 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians in their recent matchup. Alec Burleson led the Cardinals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs, while Dustin May earned the win and Riley O'Brien secured the save.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Take Down Twins 9-5**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 9-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Trevor Story leading the offense. Story's impressive performance included 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Detroit**
top_news.summary: The Kansas City Royals dropped a 1-2 decision to the Detroit Tigers, failing to secure a win. Wenceel Pérez led the Royals' offense with a home run and an RBI.

top_news.title: **Giants Shut Out Reds 3-0**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, winning 3-0. Jung Hoo Lee and Landen Roupp were key contributors to the Giants' win.

top_news.title: **Nationals' Waldichuk Shifted to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Washington Nationals left-hander Ken Waldichuk has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Axel Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have bolstered their roster with the addition of right-handed pitcher Axel Perez, who was acquired in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Perez joins the Orioles in exchange for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott.
